replies.msg:
grammar nazi mode 黎講, 呢個唔係past tense, 而係 subjunctive 。 因為 it's time we challenged - 呢個challenge 係 hypothetical + unreal, 所以用 subjunctive。

咁岩 subjunctive 多數 verb 都係 past tense 個form , 所以先覺得 past tense。但係有個例外, be 嘅 subjunctive 係 were ( if I were you..etc)
